name: Corrèze (France)
description: Quartered: first, gold with two red lions passant; second, chequy of red and white; third, gold with red diagonal stripes (bendy); fourth, gold with three blue lions rampant.
history: The quarters combine the arms of the historic lordships of the Limousin and Bas-Limousin that make up the modern département.

features.role: four quarters combining local lordship arms
two red lions passant in the first quarter
chequy red and white in the second quarter
three blue lions rampant in the fourth quarter
